description: Product Changelog/Versions system - Create product_changelogs migration/model, add changelog management to admin product edit form, display changelog on product detail page publicly, add relationship to Product model.
steps: Create database/migrations/2024_07_01_000100_create_product_changelogs_table.php with columns: id, product_id (foreign key to products), version (string 50), notes (text), released_at (date), timestamps. Index on product_id.
Create app/Models/ProductChangelog.php with fillable [product_id, version, notes, released_at], casts for released_at as date, belongsTo Product relationship.
Add hasMany ProductChangelog relationship (changelogs()) to app/Models/Product.php

Update app/Http/Controllers/Admin/ProductController.php: In the update method, after updating the product, check if request has changelog_version and changelog_notes filled - if so, create a new ProductChangelog entry with the product's id, the provided version, notes, and released_at as today. Also pass existing changelogs to the edit view.

Add a 'Version History' card section to resources/views/admin/products/_form.blade.php (at the bottom, only shown when editing): a table/list showing existing changelog entries (version, notes, date) and input fields for adding a new version entry (changelog_version text input, changelog_notes textarea).

Add a 'Changelog' section to resources/views/products/show.blade.php - after the Description card and before the Reviews card. Show a timeline-style list of version entries (version number, date, notes). Only show if the product has changelog entries. Load changelogs in the ProductController show method.
Update app/Http/Controllers/ProductController.php show method to eager-load changelogs (ordered by released_at desc) and pass them to the view.
acceptance_criteria: Migration file creates product_changelogs table with correct columns
Admin product form has changelog section for editing
Product detail page shows changelog timeline when entries exist
ProductController passes changelogs data to show view
verification: Run php -l on migration file, model, and updated controllers
Verify Blade directive balance in modified _form.blade.php and show.blade.php
findings: All PHP files pass php -l syntax validation. Blade directives balanced in both modified views (_form.blade.php and products/show.blade.php). Changelog section added as full-width row (lg:col-span-2) at bottom of admin form grid. Public changelog uses timeline-style with dots and vertical line. Changelogs eager-loaded with orderByDesc(released_at) in both admin edit and public show methods.
